name: property managers handling 5–15 maintenance requests/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 maintenance requests/month, inefficient management causes delayed repairs. We streamline request handling instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem_solved: Inefficient management of maintenance requests and contractor scheduling.
